app.name: SahPravas
app.tagline: Travel together. Maharashtra's free community ride-sharing.

trust.badge: No Commission • No Ads • Completely Free

hero.title: Share the journey across Maharashtra
hero.subtitle: Going to another city? Offer your empty seats, or find a ride from a fellow traveller. Free, direct, and built for the community.

search.title: Where are you headed?
search.subtitle: Search rides between cities in Maharashtra.

items.title: Completely Free
items.desc: No commission, no booking fees, no ads. Ever. The platform is a community service.

items.title: Direct Contact
items.desc: Call or WhatsApp the driver directly. No middleman, no waiting for approvals.

items.title: Zero Sign-up
items.desc: No accounts, no OTP, no passwords. Open the site and start right away.

items.title: Built for Maharashtra
items.desc: Made for everyday intercity travel — Beed, Latur, Pune, and every town in between.

guidelines.title: Community Guidelines
guidelines.subtitle: A few simple things keep SahPravas safe and friendly for everyone.
items: Share accurate trip details — route, time, and seats.
Confirm the fare (if any) directly with the driver before travelling.
Be on time and keep your travel companions informed.
Treat every co-traveller with courtesy and respect.
Never share rides for anything illegal or unsafe.
Verify the vehicle and driver details when you meet.

ride.whatsappMessage: Hello {{name}}, I saw your SahPravas ride from {{from}} to {{to}} on {{date}}. Is a seat still available?

rides.title: Available Rides
rides.subtitle: Active rides shared by the community.

empty.title: No rides found
empty.message: There are no active rides matching your search right now. Try changing the filters — or be the first to offer this route!

create.title: Offer a Ride
create.subtitle: Share your empty seats with fellow travellers. It only takes a minute.

success.title: Your ride is live!
success.message: Travellers can now see your ride and contact you directly. Thank you for sharing.

booking.title: Book a seat
booking.note: The driver will see your name and number so they can coordinate the pickup.

success.title: Seat booked!
success.message: Please call or WhatsApp the driver to confirm your pickup point and timing.

errors.no_seats: Sorry, this ride just became fully booked.
errors.ride_not_found: This ride is no longer available.
errors.invalid_phone: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.datePast: Date cannot be in the past
validation.seatsMax: That seems too many — please check
validation.sameCity: Pickup and destination cannot be the same city

footer.tagline: A free community ride-sharing platform for Maharashtra.
footer.builtBy: Built by the community, for the community.
footer.disclaimer: SahPravas only connects travellers. Trips, fares, and safety are arranged directly between users. Please travel responsibly.

config.missingMessage: Supabase is not configured yet. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to your environment, then reload.
